new_terms.context: AMD’s return to the datacenter CPU market with their EPYC Naples 7001 series
could only afford to tape out a single die that had to be used for both desktop PCs, server and even embedded
Each die holds 2 Core Complexes (CCX), with 4 cores and 8MB of L3 connected with a crossbar.
Infinity Fabric on Package (IFOP) links connected each die to the other 3 in the package
Infinity Fabric Inter Socket (IFIS) links enabled dual-socket designs.
Eight 8-core Core Compute Dies (CCD) surrounded a central I/O die containing the memory and PCIe interfaces
while the I/O die stayed on GlobalFoundries’ 12nm.
signals travel across the substrate over Global Memory Interconnect (GMI) links.
offer the full gamut of core counts across the SKU stack by including different numbers of CCDs.
